creator: ah@linux-hq.de
text:
On Sun, 11 Sep 2011 06:10:18 UT, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of textproc/p5-XML-Generator,
>
> Please note that PR ports/160651 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/160651

patch is approved.

Thanks, Andreas
